zh.Avington, England: 英國英格蘭哈普爾阿文頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Edward Clerke於1170年出生在英國英格蘭肯特武其時，他的父親Henry Edward de Clarke26歲，母親Susanna Hook23歲。他和Mrs Edward Clarke至少有1個兒子。他去世於1230年在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.Avington, England: 英国英格兰哈普爾阿文頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Edward Clerke于1170年出生在英国英格兰肯特武其时，他的父亲Henry Edward de Clarke26岁，母亲Susanna Hook23岁。他和Mrs Edward Clarke至少有1个儿子。他去世于1230年在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Clerke
meanings: Anglo-Norman: Clerk, one who has received schooling

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Edward Clerke was born in 1170, in Woodchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry Edward de Clarke, was 26 and his mother, Susanna Hook, was 23. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Edward Clarke. He died in 1230, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Edward Clerke est né en 1170, à Woodchurch, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry Edward de Clarke, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Susanna Hook, avait 23 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Edward Clarke. Il est décédé en 1230, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Edward Clerke 1170 in Woodchurch, Kent, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry Edward de Clarke 26 und seine Mutter Susanna Hook 23. Er hatte mit Mrs Edward Clarke mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1230 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Clerke è nato il nel 1170 nel Woodchurch, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry Edward de Clarke, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Susanna Hook, aveva 23 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs Edward Clarke. Morì nel 1230, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Avington, England: イギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアアヴィントン
ja.Woodchurch, Kent, England: イギリスイギリスケントウッドチャーチ
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Clerkeが1170年にイギリスイギリスケントウッドチャーチで生まれた時，父Henry Edward de Clarkeは26歳，母Susanna Hookは23歳であった。彼はMrs Edward Clarkeとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1230年に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Edward Clerke(이)가 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 우드c후르치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry Edward de Clarke(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Susanna Hook(은)는 23세였다. 그는 Mrs Edward Clarke(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1230년 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Woodchurch, Kent, England: Woodchurch, Centlond, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Edward Clerke nasceu em 1170, em Woodchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry Edward de Clarke, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Susanna Hook, tinha 23 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Mrs Edward Clarke. Ele faleceu em 1230, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Edward Clerke родился в 1170 г. в местности вудчурч, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry Edward de Clarke было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Susanna Hook, 23. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Edward Clarke. Он умер в 1230 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Edward Clerke nació en 1170, en Woodchurch, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry Edward de Clarke, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Susanna Hook, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Mrs Edward Clarke. Murió en 1230, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
